# Pull Request

## Summary
<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Security checklist
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, API keys, or real data added to the repo
- [ ] New dependencies reviewed (license + known CVEs)
- [ ] Input validation / output encoding considered for any new user input
- [ ] CodeQL and Security Scan workflows pass
- [ ] Threat model / docs updated if behavior or trust boundaries changed

## Testing
<!-- How was this verified? -->
